function.message: I reviewed the next inbox item and validated its explicit OCR file list. I cannot complete the request as written because one required path is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_04_14__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md` (file not found). Please confirm whether this should instead be `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_14__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md`. Once confirmed, I can process the full set exactly as requested.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox-processing rule that explicit file lists are exact and complete; did not substitute or partially process. Per clarification discipline, re-checked with search before concluding missing data.
function.outcome_justification: The authoritative inbox request (`00_inbox/724_next-task.md`) lists five exact OCR targets. One listed path does not exist (read returned file not found), and confirmation search under `50_finance/purchases` found only the non-underscored counterpart. Completing 4 of 5 would violate completeness and require guessing/substitution.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of underscored listed file (not found)
